string.text: Record: \ n your mother ... barely put a helicopter ... The second pilot is dead, and I .... I go to the point where I should meet with the liaison. I hope he is still alive.

Record: \ n tried to transport drugs through the zone ... Everything went not according to plan .... something was knocked down in the sky! Okay, the load is safe and I go to the client on foot. The main thing is not to run into mutants ...
Perhaps this key opens some doors in the sector-11 complex.
The key-card leading to the laboratory in the complex "Sector-11".

Record No. 1: \ n they think I went crazy! They do not know what I saw there ... \ n record No. 2: \ n these voices in the head, every night. I can't do that anymore. I begin to repeat everything that they say. \ n record No. 3: \ n the voice in my head told me to get rid of this key card, which I took with me from the laboratory. \ n record No. 4: \ n I buried this key card on the hill against the wall. Now she will not be angry with the voice. I will go behind this voice, wherever he call me. \ n record No. 5: \ n no more ... Why did you leave me? It's so hard for me, I'm afraid I have to do something ... I need this voice! \ n record No. 6: \ n someone calls for help in this village. I have a special detector, with it I will find them! I will help them! They call me!
An empty canister, you need to find fuel. Package: (5l).
The key-card leading to the main complex "Sector-11".
Do you want to return your ticket home? Then you have to agree to our conditions! Athena is with us. You will find me in a stalker bar.

Last entry: \ n here is a freak, blue! He intimidated us and took the things of that girl, his mother ... The owner will be very angry if we do not bring him this case, we need to find this girl and the kid ... Eh ... Well, nothing, the zone is round, soon we will find them and arrange a warm welcome to them. \ n %C [255,248,153,26] There are also the coordinates of the case of the case.
This key to the case in which my things are located.
The key-card from the door leading to the laboratory in the metro complex.
There is a lot of important information, I hope this will help scientists and Athena. You need to give them to them.
Container with Athens things. The castle will not be touched, so the quiet could not open it.
It is necessary to bring this to scientists.

Hot tea. This is a rather good and relatively healthy way to stay on your feet when you get tired or when you wait for cold dark nights. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,ILATIONAL] A powerful slopping effect \ N %c [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] moderate increase in drowsiness \ n %C [0,153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Healthy diet
%C [0.225.0.0] • You can sell equipment. \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] Various spare parts for pistols common in the zone.
%C [0.225.0.0] • You can sell equipment. \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] Electronics from various assault rifles. A fairly valuable, although not always necessary thing in repair.
%C [0.225.0.0] • You can sell equipment. \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] Various shutters, muzzle brakes and gas outlets - in general, utility for assault rifles of various manufacturers.
A device for hacking: systems of small objects, their protection, as well as passwords of semi -automatic and automatic doors.

The invention of scientists, which allows you to see hidden abnormal fields and single anomalies. It is possible to jam weak abnormal fields. It works on removable akumulators, before that it has not been tested.

The quiet completely crazy! He said that we would go down to the complex and closed the hermic highway, no ... I won't climb there, what kind of? Hey, no guys! What are you? ... *shots *... *strange mooing nearby *.
\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ n The traditional banknote, which is enforced mainly in the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is yellow.

\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ N, a traditional banknote, which is enforced mainly in the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is greenishly salad.
\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ n The traditional banknote, which is enforced mainly in the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is green.

\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ n The traditional banknote, which is mainly on the territory of the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is red.

\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ n The traditional banknote, which is mainly on the territory of the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is gray violet. The subsidiability of the banknote was cashed out on Zagan or Janov.

\ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] was developed by artist Ivanovich Dubasov \ N \ N, a traditional banknote, which is enforced mainly in the USSR. The standard color of the banknote is gray. The period of stability is one of the largest bills of the country. The banknote was naked on Zatona or Yanovov.
An ordinary bolt, with its help, stalkers in the zone - pave the way between anomalies.
Parcel of the Sych, for the professor on the "VNZ".

A box with a code lock. A small mark on the lid says that its contents belong to three stalkers, among the nicknames of which there are "spirit". The impressive weight of this container suggests that it is packed to the top with different good.
The color can be beautiful, but it is not worth it. A little radioactive.
Tasty and quite edible mushroom. However, slightly radioactive.

Using this tool, you can remove the sight worn on the weapon. \ n \ n %C [255,255,255,255] Instructions for use: \ n %C [255,255,255,255] • %C [255,255,255,255] To remove the sight, pick up the right weapon. \ n %C [255,255,255,255] • %C [255,255,255,255] is activated by a double click on the tool.

Hage sleeping bag. Perhaps the most convenient way to spend the night in the zone. But it will not save from radiation, so for the night you need to look for places more so. For example, those where you can wait out the release.

\ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] is suitable for all types of weapons \ N \ N %C [0.170,170,170] The arms oil of the Red Army, which has been used for more than 70 years. The metal oil is divided into two parts: in one oil, in the other a cleaning solvent. Found widely used during World War II, attached from the factory to the Mosin rifle. Since then, liquid compositions have been improved several times, but the design of the oilcock has remained unchanged. "Two" is very popular in the zone due to its versatility. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] liquid weERNSION Oil and purer Solvent \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0.170,170,170] 62 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140IALANAGEMENTS) to: %C [0.170,170,170] 19 %\ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140]

\ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] is suitable for all types of weapons \ N \ N %C [0.170,170,170] This kit contains oils, solvent, basic enrollment for Cleaning and special tools used for disassembling weapons and its various mechanisms. It also comes with a set of main spare parts for firearms. In a word - there is everything that is necessary for the repair of weapons if you have at least some idea how and what works in it. It is quite heavy, but indispensable with long sorties deep into the zone, as it will help you save your life with an unexpected refusal of weapons. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value \ N %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0,170,170,AR70] 22 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0,140,140IALANALS] BASIC Improvement of the weapon to: %C [0.170,170,170] 39 %\ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140]

\ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] is suitable for all types of helmet \ N \ N %C [0.170,170,170] This improved and extended sewing set contains more cash -linked accessories than simple sets. Two coils of nylon threads and a large selection of high -quality needles make it suitable for working with thick and solid materials, including lungs of mutants and complex artificial dense fabrics. With it, you can paste a damaged helmet. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [255,238,153.26] • %C [0.140.140,140] is used in the equipment repair OL %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0,170,170,AR70] 64 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0,140,140IALATION] BASIC Improvement of the Equipment state: %C [0.170,170,170] 18 %\ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140]
Field set of helmet repair (not used)
Field set of helmets repair (remained on 3 use)
Field set of helmets repair (remained on 2 use)
Field set of helmets repair (remained on 1 use)

\ n \ n %c [0.140.140.140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] All helmets of \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] The field version of the universal set for outdoor repair, a sort of “Golden Sunday” Between mobility (weight) and universality of use. Consists of tools of the military class and materials sufficient to perform maintenance of most types of modern helmets. Durable tools allow you to work with Kevlar and metal. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHTICAL product \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] HIGHT value \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,IA40] is used in the repair of equipment \ n %C [255,238,153,26] %C [0.140.140.140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0.170,170,170] 28 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,140] BASE ELECTION OF EXPERTICALS on: %C [0,170,170,170] 36 %36 %36 % \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140]

\ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] All equipment \ N \ N %C [0.170,170,170] The heavy advanced military class set is designed to work with cracks plates of modern body armor. It contains a large amount of metal threads that allow you to sew together literally torn clothes. The kit also includes the main mechanical tools with which you can disassemble part of the clothes or helmet in order to save repair materials. This is the best and high -quality sewing set available within the alienation zone. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHTICAL product \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] HIGHT value \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,IA40] is used in the repair of equipment \ n %C [255,238,153,26] %C [0.140.140.140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0.170,170,170] 60 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140,140] BASIC ELECTION OF EXPERTUCE per: %C [0,170,170,170] 20 %ECH \ N \ n %C [0.140,140,140]
Professional set for repairing armor and helmets (not used)
Professional set for repairing armor and helmets (remained on 3 use)
Professional set for repairing armor and helmets (remained on 2 use)
Professional set for repairing armor and helmets (remained on 1 use)

\ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] compatibility: \ n \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140.140] All equipment \ N \ N %C [0.170,170,170] This complex and very professional set includes everything necessary: ​​from the ULTRA-DISTROY threads and needles, to polymer patches - to carry out the full restoration of any armor. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHTICAL product \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] HIGHT value \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,IA40] is used in the repair of equipment \ n %C [255,238,153,26] %C [0.140.140.140] cannot be used in the state below: %C [0.170,170,170] 20 %\ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0,140,140IAIANAD] BASIC EMPLECTION ON THE EXPERTUSHING to: %C [0,170,170IAMATIONS] \ n %C [0.140,140,140]

A special scientific container for artifacts. Designed for manual carrying of especially dangerous or radioactive artifacts. Despite the small size, it provides the necessary protection against abnormal and radioactive radiation. It is made of special over -strength plastic, covered with a layer of the latest alloy metals obtained in the laboratory on Lake Amber. The manufacturing process is kept secret, but it is known that the rigid radiation of any intensity is almost completely shielded by the walls of the container. It is in great demand among professional booths of artifacts. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] does not require recharge \ N %C [0.225,225,225] • %C [0.140.140.140] allows you to transport artifacts \ N %C [0.225,225,225] • %C [0,140,140IAIAMATS] Maximum capacity: %C [0.170.170,170] 3 artifact OL %C [0.204.0.51] Attention: \ n \ n %C [Default] should be removed from the container before selling them.
%C [255,255,255,110] In this box, artifacts are stored under a common energy impulse.

Dry ration, ready for use (known as MRE) is an atomic, individual diet of the United States Armed Forces in the field, during combat operations or under other election conditions, when there are no normal food sources nearby. One dry ration can be used once. Dishes for dry rations are designed to withstand complex and difficult operating conditions and protect the contents from the external influence of the environment. One packaging contains: the first dish and a number of other foods and drinks. Although all this can be consumed cold, but each pack includes a free heater (the device of a water -activated exothermic reaction that radiates heat), which helps to warm up food, which makes it much tastier. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] MILITARY \ N \ N %C [0,153,255,255] • %C [0,140,I40,140] high -quality product] \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] Healthy nutrition \ N %C [0,153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] 3 portions in one package. 1398 kcal in total

Something like a personal diary ... Among the pile of different drawings on the pages - there is something interesting: \ n doors to the laboratory, we welded - we deactivated the remote control. How to get out of here now? According to the data found, there is some kind of hangar in which C4 charges should be stored. Take a note if we cannot find another way out ... (not finished).
Plastic explosives of a standard army model.
Case with information about the Sector 11 project.
On the PDA there is a fresh sound recording from an unknown sender and a message with a timer for departure. However, it is damaged ...

A list of radio materials that need technique: \ n Bank Canifoli - 2 pieces. \ n capacitors packaging - 2 pieces. \ n textolite base - 2 pieces. \ n a transistor box - 4 pieces. \ n a coil of copper wire - 2 pieces.

The base costume of a stalker is a newcomer suit. The usual clothing of a tourist is a storm and boots. It does not provide noticeable protection to the carrier, unless it will allow to freeze at night and weaken the bite of a blind dog. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] 1 container for artifacts is built.

Lightened version of the exoskeleton. In the manufacture, its armor elements were used. There is no hydraulic system. The body armor protects well from small arms, and the built -in gas mask and overalls from rubberized fabric provide good protection against abnormal influences. It is equipped with a built -in container for artifacts. \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] heavy bulletpoint \ N %C [0.153,255.255.255] • %C [0,140,140IAIANALS 16.3 kg \ n \ n

An ordinary stalker PDA, which, in fact, has every inhabitant of the Choso. Contains digital magazines, detailed maps of zones and places of anomalies. If you find a “desired” merchant, you can earn good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological subject
First aid medical complex. The composition includes: \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] \ n ordinary steampack steampack 3pcs. \ n first -aid kit 1pc. \ n bandage 2pcs. \ n "Barvinok" 1 pc.

Medical medical complex. The composition includes: \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] \ n military steampack 3pcs. \ n ordinary steampack 1pc. \ n Army first -aid kit 1 pc. \ n Antirad 1pc. \ n bandage 1pc. \ n "Hercules" 1 pc.

Medical complex of scientists. The composition includes: \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] \ n Scientific steampack 2pcs. \ n ordinary steampack steampack 1pc. \ n military steampack 1pc. \ n scientific first -aid kit 1pc. \ n Antirad 2pcs. \ n bandage 2pcs. \ n "antidote" 1pc. \ n "psi-block" 1 pc. \ n "Barvinok" 1 pc.
A small battery required for a flashlight. Cheap and reliable. In unstable conditions of the zone, the operating time varies from 20%. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] Operating time ~ 1 hour.

A small mini-accumulator required for a flashlight. It has an average price and reliability. In unstable conditions of the zone, the operating time varies from 20%. Some stalkers argue that the physical strength of these batteries is amazing. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] Operating time ~ 2 hours.

The elite invention of scientists, created to power a flashlight. It costs more than analogues, but the energy intensity is fantastic. In unstable conditions of the zone, the operating time varies from 20%. Most often serves stalkers for the longest of all other types of batteries that are sold in the zone. Recommended in distant sorties. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] Operating time ~ 4 hours.

A first -aid kit developed by scientists for the territory of the zone. Allows for the shortest time to get the rapid healing of wounds, burns, injuries. It is not popular, although sometimes such a first -aid kit is at times more needed than ordinary. True, such a first -aid kit is more expensive, but the effect gives much faster. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] is a secret development of scientists.
An empty army flask for drinking water with a volume of: 0.7 liters.
Army flask with clean water for 1 sip. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.
Army flask with clean water for 2 sips. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.
Army flask with clean water for 3 sips. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.
Container with medicines for Kostrav. It weighs a lot, apparently he will not touch it.

This device is hung on the belt. It was developed specifically for the treatment of wounds - machines (nanabots) find open bleeding wounds and accelerate blood coagulation penetrating into the body of the carrier. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] is a secret development of scientists.

Mineral water 0.5 liters. Water quality is good, pleasant to taste. Gives strength and completely cleanses the body. \ n the standard attribute of stalkers. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [default] The normal sobering effect \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [default] quenches thirst.

A bottle of beer 0.5 liters. The second, after vodka, is in popularity a drink in the zone. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] stimulator ELS \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Weak alcohol \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] A weak increase in drowsiness LUTE [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IAIAYAYUS] \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] High -quality product \ N %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] will slightly quench thirst.

A set of fully charged batteries used in military units. Very valuable and are in great demand due to the constant lack of batteries in the zone. Used by all groups and stalkers of all ranks, from newcomers to masters. They are supplied by sales officers of military units trying to earn extra money in the zone. \ n does not require recharging. \ n gets everything necessary from the sun and the environment (anomalies). \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] Charging: %C [0.170,170,170] +98 %\ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] DeLADS OF MILICAL
Night vision device. Designed to observe objects at night or at dusk, when it is simply not enough the brightness of objects for the eye of a person.

The standard set of equipment of the soldier is a medium, semi -Army body armor with overhead plates on the whole body. Effectively protects against pistol bullets and fragments. Ineffective against abnormal and other influences. The installation of containers for artifacts alas is not provided, but installing various auxiliary systems is possible.

Samples of the equipment of the Special Forces of the Western Army are taken as the basis. Due to the special processing of the fabric, the stability of the armor with physical displacement of the plates is enhanced. In terms of protective characteristics, the “dawn” is slightly superior to the overalls, it has a gas mask that is not suitable for harsh conditions of the zone. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] built 2 containers for artifacts. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] Built-in a 1st generation night vision device. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] included gas mask.

Experimental sample of the military semi-exposquition. Army equipment made specifically for commanding units, created for conducting assault operations in zones with high abnormal activity. The composition is: reinforced heavy armored vehicles and a built-in compensation costume with an exoskeleton plates, as well as the “SPER-12M” helmet. The internal body armor is able to stop the bullet fired from the machine gun. Containers for artifacts can fully be built into the costume. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] built 3 containers for artifacts. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] included helmet.
The usual clothes of a novice stalker. It does not save the carrier either from the bullet or from the anomalies, but is convenient to wear. There are no built -in containers for artifacts.

This costume is made by monolith fanatics, it is almost impossible to get it, but it gives excellent protection against radiation and psi radiation. The technology of creating armor is unknown, as well as the materials themselves. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] built 2 containers for artifacts.

Sometimes stalkers who do not want to join any of the existing groups, unite into clans, cooperating with friends and proven acquaintances. The main principle of such an association is to hold together so that they are not exterminated by one. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing

Representatives of the criminal world who have come to the zone for various reasons: to earn on the sale of artifacts, to hide from the law, to buy or sell weapons. There is a lot of such an element in the zone from the level of punks to serious criminals. For the most part, they are united in gangs. Although there is still no unified gangster organization in the zone, they are very bought by ordinary stalkers. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing

The most mysterious and secretive group in the zone, the existence of which many do not even believe. Some constantly use the services of mercenaries: professionals in their field, they will quickly deal with any stalker and can even completely eliminate a small group. For their services, apparently, they take considerable amounts in money or artifacts. The location of the base of this group is still a mystery; Obviously, it is somewhere in the depths of the zone. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing

Soldiers of regular army units. They protect approaches to the closed territory of the zone, patrolling the perimeter, shooting mutants and catching the looters. Army special forces are elite units. As a rule, they are planted in the area for rescue and special operations. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing

A clearly militarized group, characterized by strict discipline: its members live in fact according to the charter. Only representatives of the “debt” do not trade unique creatures of the zone with the outside world: according to rumors, all artifacts found by these people are surrendered to scientists. Each "Dolvets" considers its main goal to protect the world from the influence of the zone. Most group operations are associated with the extermination of monsters, so the debt raids often save ordinary stalkers from many pressing problems. For a long time and violently enmity with the group "Freedom". The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value] high value

Anarchists and daredevils who declared themselves fighters for freedom in the zone, and therefore constantly conflicting with army units, military stalkers and the group “Debt”. “Svobodovites” believe that information about what is happening in the zone cannot be hidden from humanity, thus disputing the monopoly of government organizations to own local secrets and miracles. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value] high value

Group, rather resembling a religious sect. Its members believe that an evolutionary crystal of unearthly origin is in the center of the zone - a monolith. Most stalkers despise the adherents of the “monolith”, considering them obsessed. Since its education, the group prevents the promotion of stalkers to the center of the zone, motivating this with the unkind intentions of the latter in relation to the monolith. According to rumors, the monoliths have a large base somewhere closer to the center of the zone, but no one knows its exact location except the members of the group themselves. The stripping of groups must be stored secret from their fighters, as this can lead to serious conflicts. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value] high value

The most interesting inhabitants of the zone are not only mutants, but also those who study them. Scientists from different countries go to the zone to find out its secrets and discover something new for humanity. Rarely where you can meet these scientists in large clusters. Basically, they sit in the camps for days and explore everything - that stalkers bring them. However, when selling appropriate merchants, you can get good money. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value] high value

A simple piece of fabric rolled into a mask. It is often used by stalkers to prevent hazardous particles from entering the body, in the form of a precaution. It is recommended to wear even in the absence of signaling the Geiger counter, since the air can be infected to some extent. However, with prolonged use, it can accumulate toxins. Thus, it is advisable to always have a spare mask for quick replacement.

The meat of the flesh has good taste and greater nutritional value. It is better to refrain from using this meat in raw form, since it is probably infected with trichinellosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted when using infected meat. Symptoms include fever, fatigue and loss of appetite, which in severe conditions of the zone is very dangerous. \ n \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Poisonous food \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140.140,140] Radiation radiation: %C [0.170,170,170] +584 MZV

The meat of the boar is very nutritious and quite edible. It is better to refrain from using this meat in raw form, since it is probably infected with trichinellosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted when using infected meat. Symptoms include fever, fatigue and loss of appetite, which in severe conditions of the zone is very dangerous. \ n \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Poisonous food \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140.140,140] Radiation radiation: %C [0.170,170,170] +646 MZV

The meat mutated blind dog, not as nutritious as the meat of a boar or flesh, is quite edible. It is better to refrain from using this meat in raw form, since it is probably infected with trichinellosis or brucellosis. These diseases are transmitted when using infected meat. Symptoms include fever, fatigue and loss of appetite, which in severe conditions of the zone is very dangerous. \ n \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Poisonous food \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140.140,140] Radiation radiation: %C [0.170,170,170] +202 MZV
The meat of a blind dog

The tentacles of the bloodsucker contain a special gland: it emits an enzyme that dissolves the skin of the victim, and at the same time prevents blood fracturing. If scientists manage to determine the structure of the enzyme, then this will help to carry out a breakthrough in medicine. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Properties: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] The mutated part of the body \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] Scientific example

Trade in the alienation zone is carried out mainly through electronic payments for security purposes and simplicity of calculations. But many stalkers store a certain number of coins for a rainy day when they senior to buy some trifle, like cigarettes or food. This greatly simplifies life and saves the charge of your PDA. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VIMEDPENT OF \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IAIANALS %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] generally accepted value
Still suitable for the use of the key-card, below the signature: "VNOS-Me".

Your personal identification card is an impassive. It is necessary to keep it secret so as not to cause suspicion among local stalkers. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing
Nourishing product. Delicious and healthy juice, in the battered packaging. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst a little.
Apparently, it used to be stored soda. Now, it seems, simple, drinking water is poured there. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.

This chocolate bar with protein will provide the body with the necessary proteins and sugar, which will give strength, energy and tone. Useful in long moves, when there is no time to eat normally. True, in the zone such chocolate bars are very rare. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140IA.140,140] Healthy nutIATE \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] HIGHTARICAL PRODUCTION
Appetizing meat crust, fried ray and sauce ... prepared from a wild boar, thanks to the correct frying - is not radioactive and very tasty.

Cooling carbonated drink with a popgone extract. Stalkers interfere with it themselves, and spread it as a delicious drink, but because of a bunch of additives, it is very useful. One sip of this drink tones and restores strength. The soda "hit" in the nose, and resembles the taste of life from the great earth! A very beloved by stalkers and at the same time a rare product in the zone, since there are very few ingredients to create it, hence its high cost. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.

The prototype of the overalls "Seva". On the patch of the combination of the number 11. Apparently this is some kind of logo. Perhaps these are exclusive costumes, a certain group in the Choso. The system of protection against abnormal influences and radiation is rightfully considered unsurpassed. The possibility of modernization and two built -in containers for artifacts, improved armor. Additional protection in Kevlar inserts.

Composition and protection against many threat factors - suggests that the costume makes the carrier well protected. The costume is a hybrid and the only one in its copy: collected from different parts of costumes and servo drives from new technologies - it at times strengthens the strength indicators of the media and provides it with good protection.

Specialized medical kit for first aid for injuries on the battlefield. The set includes means to accelerate blood coagulation based on “menadion”, painkillers, antibiotics and immunity stimulants; In addition, there is a simple surgical set for extracting fragments and bullets. Homemade steampaks (stimulants): are very popular among novice stalkers, since it is easy to get and are quite inexpensive. It is made from the ingredients widely accessible in the zone without proper cleaning and without the use of special equipment. This is the main cause of many side effects, which include headache, paresthesia and significant hunger after use. Entered into the thigh. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] RAM (SPRIC) \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] MIDEN

Universal medical set of one -time use. Allows you to cope with injuries of various types and degree of complexity: injuries, soft tissue bruises, thermal and chemical burns, various kinds of poisoning. It is very popular among stalkers. Military stimulant. Military steampaks (stimulants): are part of the standard military equipment for operations in the conditions of the alienation zone. Quite often they are found in the market of goods and can be bought for a moderate price. Popular among experienced stalkers, as they are significantly more powerful and fast -acting than their affordable self -foil analogues, which makes them ideal for use in dangerous troubles. They are made of high density raw materials, which can adversely affect the orenism. Of the side effects, shock, dizziness and strong exacerbation of a feeling of hunger are known. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECIMENT \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140IAMATIONS) %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] RAM (syringe)

A medical set developed specifically for researchers who work in the zone. Contains funds both for healing mechanical injuries, and to prevent the development of radiation disease. Unlike other sets, you can find Vikasol, Batilol and C-Naftizin in this. Experimental scientific stimulator: is produced by the same chemical department in Kyiv, which developed the famous Seva and Seva-11 costume. This stimulant is the most powerful health stabilizer of all zone available in the territory. The best ingredients of excellent quality and the improved formula allow you to almost instantly restore health and remove excess radiation. Side effects are minimized. Very expensive, therefore are used only by very lucky and successful stalkers. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] High -quality product \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] RAM (syringe)

The jamb will calmly calm the nerves and help to relax for a while. In combination with alcohol causes a calming effect. Increases the feeling of hunger and thirst. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Stimulator \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] is exerted %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] A slight increase in drowsiness

Cigarettes imported from the west. Someone should have already smoked most of them, there are only a few pieces left. Smoking will help stabilize the mental state and will allow you to forget a little about hunger. In the zone are rare, therefore very valuable. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Stimulator \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,ALLIAKS] Weak spinning effect \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] A slight decrease in drowsiness

The drink adored by Russians, and many other people around the world. This is Russian vodka rather high quality. It is stored in military flasks or in glass bottles, but in the latter it can be easily damaged and broken. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Stimulator \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0,140,140,140] Strong alcohol \ NC %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] A strong increase in drowsiness \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,ALSTA] High -quality product \ n %C [255,238,153,26] %C [0.140,140,140] is used for:%C [0.170,170,170] Weapons maintenance (+4%)
Slices of bread, this bread is not infected, not radioactive, fresh enough and quite edible. In any case, none of the stalkers has yet complained.

Tuzenka is a common name for canned foods made in the Soviet Union and other countries of the Warsaw Treaty. The irony is that the idea of ​​such a product came to Russia during the Second World War in the form of assistance from the United States. Since then, various types of stews have become the main means of long storage of meat, which is used by both the civilian population and the ranks of the army. It is worth noting that despite the long expiration date, the stew has high nutritional value (due to the high fat content) and relatively good taste. The Chernobyl zone of alienation saw many varieties of stew. Since the spring of 2013, the chopped meat of the Abakan brand remains an undoubted leader among the rest of the canned food. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140IA.140,140] Healthy nutIATE \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] HIGHT value

Nemiroff is a Ukrainian producer of alcoholic beverages, which specializes mainly in the supply of vodka. It is founded in the city of Nemirov, the Vennitsky region. One of the best vanks in the world and in the zone, however, should not be abused. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] stimulator ELS \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Strong alcohol \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] moderate increase in drowsiness

Stalkers often stock up on them in front of a long -term routes. It has an invigorating effect, is very useful with fatigue. The drink also cuts off a little head after a hangover, and also causes the release of adrenaline into the bloodstream. In order to avoid an overdose, it is recommended not to abuse. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] stimulator ELS \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] Strongly sobering effect \ N %C [0,153,255,255] IS [0.140,140,140] A significant decrease in drowsiness \ N %C [0,153,255,255] %C [0.140,140,140] Healthy diet

Ukrainian beer. The second, after vodka, is in popularity a drink in the zone. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] stimulator ELS \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] Weak alcohol \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] A weak increase in drowsiness LUTE [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IAIAYAYUS] \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] High -quality product

Middle and small tomatoes are used for pickling. Recommended varieties: Humbert, San Marsano and other small-fruited varieties of tomatoes with dense pulp and thick skin. Before pickling, the fruits are sorted by size and degree of maturity, rejecting overripe, soft, frozen, sick tomatoes. Then the stalk is removed. Tomatoes are washed in cold water and tightly laid in glass jars. Pouring is poured so that it covers the fruits. Spices are added directly to the container in which pickling is carried out, or to the gulf marinade. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IALANAGEAL]

Sodium caffeine and gasoline, which make the nervous system work with the highest possible efficiency. To a large extent reduce drowsiness. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Stimulator \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IALSIA %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140,140] good energy
A jar of salty nuts, with a good content of vitamins. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Healthy diet

The drug of the Mexamine radio protection action, widespread in the zone. When used causes narrowing of peripheral blood vessels and oxygen starvation, which in this case is a means of preventing and treatment of radiation disease. Well tolerated by the overwhelming majority of people; In some cases, light nausea, dizziness, pain, less often vomiting are possible. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] RAM (SPRIC) \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] significantly reduces health when used

A small photo of a beautiful woman with black hair. The name below the image was crossed out. Book about mechanical engineering. Many stalkers use them to expand knowledge of most factories and factories in the zone. Book on industrial construction. Many stalkers use them to expand knowledge of most factories and factories in the zone. This magazine describes in detail various trading manipulations with drugs. Specific faces with nicknames, places and time of meetings. Some transactions are carried out through electronic payments, while others with payments of large amounts in cash. When pushing pages, it becomes clear that “freedom” is the main distributor of organic drugs, such as marijuana. Bandits are supplied with the most powerful and dangerous synthetic drugs, such as salicylic acid and cocaine. Apparently, each group in the zone has one or another place in such transactions. Especially the “monolith”, apparently, is reducing drugs in large quantities in exchange for more expensive types of ammunition and a technological item. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,ALATIONAL] High value \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,140] is used for: %C [0,170,170,AR70] Weapon maintenance (+2 %)

100 pages of the magazine. It helps to pass the time at leisure and not go crazy in the zone from a lack of female warmth. "From Russia with love!" \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VESTICAL PLACE C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,ALSK With:%C [0.170,170,170] cleaning and lubrication of weapons (+2%)

A glossy magazine with beautiful Slavic girls, at the turn of Joanna Krupa - a star of the month. A fairly popular find among stalkers who need psychological support. A large poster with Joanna was torn out ... \ n \ n %C [0.140.140.140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] VIASTENTION OF \ N %C [255,238,153,26] %C [0.140,140,140] is used for:%C [0.170,170,170] Weapons maintenance (+2%)

Everyone knows that the choice of good boots is a very important point. An additional pair of boots can be extremely useful. It can also become an object of envy of other stalkers, as this is a very rare, which is quite difficult to get. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VES %C [0.153,255.255] • %C [0.140,140,140] PERSONAL thing \ N %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0,140,140,140] is used for: %C [0,170,170,AR70] Equipment repair (+5 %)

The best tool for opening locks and opening doors. Often found in industrial areas. For unknown reasons, some stalkers carry him in their backpacks, despite his heavy weight. It has no particular value and important. There was one unknown stalker who dragged with a unique crowbar with the inscription "Property of Black Mesa". Some stalkers are still looking for this scrap as they would look for rare and valuable artifacts. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VESTICAL PLACE C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,ALSK With: %C [0.170,170,170] equipment repair, weapons maintenance (+3 %) \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140,140] multiple use

Each stalker realizes how important a reliable weapon is. It is for this reason that the daily inspection of your weapon is life -long to preserve your life. Stalkers often recalculate their cartridges and cleanse them of dirt to minimize the risk of weapons jamming during the battle. These cartridges are in terrible condition and should be disposed of. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Military product \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0,140,140,140] is broken, cannot be repaired ELS \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] is unsuitable for use

It is very important from time to time to be distracted from horror and suffering in this hellish abyss and take the head of other, more pleasant things. Playing cards are a pretty pleasant pastime. Also, a deck of cards is often used in sorting of various “specialized” goods for other, no less unusual, goals. The back of the architectural design of the Moscow Metro shows the back. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] VESTRUCTIONAL PLACE

The display is broken, a constant hissing from the speaker indicates that there is no point in trying to fix it. About 10 meters of a good rope, which can serve many goals, especially in a place as an alienation zone. Fully used batteries. The old metal shovel used for various purposes in the field. In fact, few people hold a shovel in their backpacks, since they meet in the zone quite often and is not difficult to find it at the right time. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] VESTRUCTIONAL PLACE

High -quality black sappers. Used for many purposes in the field. The training of special forces soldiers includes hand -to -hand combat and the use of improvised weapons, including such sappers, to eliminate enemies. Such a spatula is a formidable weapon in close combat in the hands of a special forces. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] MILIEN

An ordinary iron hammer with a wooden handle. Often found in the industrial areas of the alienation zone. Despite their heavy weight, many stalkers often carry it in their backpacks due to the possibilities of universal use. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VESTICAL PLACE C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,ALSK With: %C [0.170,170,170] equipment repair, weapons maintenance (+3 %) \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140,140] multiple use

Plastic jar with golden teeth mixed with sand. The favorite occupation of the bandits is to knock out the teeth to the fallen stalker and collect them. Sand is needed to avoid rummage when running with a jar. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] PERSONAL thing \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] HIGHT value] high value

A set of a cartographer containing several pens and lines. Everything is wrapped in a waterproof high -quality fabric. Judging by some available information on the maps - belonged to military personnel from Ukrainian artillery. Some cards were started, but not completed to the end. The cards in the GPC of a stalker are much more useful than any of the available ones. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0,140,140,140] is not indignant to use

Maps with the designation of the coordinates of the arrangement of military checkpoints inside the zone and its environs. In each GPC of a stalker there is already all the designations available on them, so this find is not enough significant benefit. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Military product \ N %C [255,238,153.26] • %C [0.140.140,140] is used With:%C [0.170,170,170] weapons maintenance (+3%)

Do you want to open canned food, tighten and tighten the moving parts of the equipment, trim the rope or sharpen anything? Use the universal and elegant Swiss knife. Packed in a small box. Quite often found among stalkers, so it is not of particular value. However, it can be used as auxiliary material in the repair of weapons and armor. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] VESTICAL PLACE C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140,140,ALSK With: %C [0.170,170,170] repair of equipment, maintenance of weapons (+2 %) \ n %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0.140.140,140] multiple use

A small mirror fixed on a thin metal tube. A convenient object used by militants who are versed in the art of fighting in urban conditions, as it allows you to look around the corner and not get a bullet. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] MILIEN

Old and rusty welding glasses with a torn leather strap were intended to protect the welder's eyes during welding or cutting. It is unlikely that they have particular value in their current state. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] VESTRUCTIONAL PLACE

A small box filled with female jewelry. Pack with the banned, unknown so much here. It is necessary to overrun.

Canned baked beans imported from the west. Beans stewed in tomato sauce will help return pleasant memories for many stalkers. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IALANAGEAL]

Costs of chili bobs brought from the west. Very popular as additional ingredients in many dishes prepared on the territory of the alienation zone. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IALANAGEAL]

An ordinary can of paint. It seems not empty ... but the paint has long dried up.

An empty metal canister. Metal, from a coral it is made, can be used as a material for the repair and repair of equipment, and you can also offer for sale to local merchants - an empty container will never be superfluous. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Explosive \ N %C [0.153,255,255] IM [0.140,140,140] TechnOLYADEN %C [255,238,153,26] • %C [0,140,140,140] is used for: %C [0,170,170,AR70] Equipment repair (+2 %)

Fully used batteries. Their only value is the metal from which they are made. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Technological device \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140,140] Charging: %C [0.204.0.51] 0 %\ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] SEECH

Cleaned mineral non -carbonated water, an important source of drinking in the zone. Every stalker should have at hand so as not to die of thirst. It gives an easy toning effect, kills thirst. \ n %C [255,1,255,255] • %C [Default] quenches thirst.

“Antipochmelin” is the best tool if you are going to derive the radiation “pleasant” way. The tablets in a matter of seconds dissolve and enter the human brain, neutralizing alcohol. However, do not neglect this method, since tablets do not affect human health well, in particular, fainting or psyche problems are possible. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] MEDICARY

Homemade stampaks (stimulants) are very popular among novice stalkers, since it is easy to get and are quite inexpensive. It is made from the ingredients widely accessible in the zone without proper cleaning and without the use of special equipment. This is the main cause of many side effects, which include headache, paresthesia and significant hunger after use. Entered into the thigh. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] RAM (SPRIC) \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] moderate health restoration EC \ n %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140.140,140] moderate increase in drowsiness

Military steampocks (stimulants) are part of a standard military equipment for operations in the conditions of alienation. Quite often they are found in the market of goods and can be bought for a moderate price. Popular among experienced stalkers, as they are significantly more powerful and fast -acting than their affordable self -foil analogues, which makes them ideal for use in dangerous troubles. They are made of high density raw materials, which can adversely affect the orenism. Of the side effects, shock, dizziness and strong exacerbation of a feeling of hunger are known. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECIMENT \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140IAMATIONS) %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] RAM (syringe) \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] FAST Restoration of health \ n %C [0.204.0.51] %C [0.140,140,140] A strong increase in drowsiness

It is produced by the same chemical department in Kyiv, which was developed by the famous Seva costume. This stimulant is the most powerful health stabilizer of all zone available in the territory. The best ingredients of excellent quality and the improved formula allow you to almost instantly restore health and remove excess radiation. Side effects are minimized. Very expensive, therefore are used only by very lucky and successful stalkers. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] High -quality product \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] RAM (syringe) \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] MICTORY Restoration of health \ N %C [0.204.0.51] %C [0.140,140,140] Slight increase in drowsiness

Glucose injection is used in severe cases of diabetes - hypoglycemia. But stalkers use it as a stimulant - an instant increase in carbohydrates in the body causes a rapid increase in energy, thereby increasing the physical strength and ability to withstand significant overload. Due to the convenience of supply and speed of use, injection can be used in a combat situation, which makes this stimulant a good means of accelerating wound healing. Contains a large dose of the drug. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] DECRECTION \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,IALLY0] RAM (SPRIC) \ N %C [0.204.0.51] • %C [0.140,140,140] MIDEN ANYTHING ANYTHING ANYTHING

A beer, cooked according to a classic recipe with a 300-year history, is produced in Lviv. It is widespread in the exclusion zone. Able to quench thirst, adds cheerfulness. In excessive quantity gives a slight alcoholic effect. \ N %c [255,1,255,255] • %C [default] dulls Zhzhda.

The rich balanced taste of classic light beer, which is cooked from selected malt. It is widespread in the exclusion zone. Able to quench thirst, adds cheerfulness. In excessive quantity gives a slight alcoholic effect. \ N %c [255,1,255,255] • %C [default] dulls Zhzhda.

A popular hot tea among stalkers, coined on edible dried mushrooms in boiled water (they say that it is not radioactive) with the addition of sugar. Stalkers who can allow to buy this drink or those who know how to make it often take it with them in long walks in the zone. This is a rather good and relatively healthy way to stay on your feet when you get tired or when you wait for cold dark nights. \ n \ n %C [0.140.140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] drink \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,ILATIONAL] A powerful slopping effect \ N %c [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140,140,140] moderate increase in drowsiness \ n %C [0,153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] Healthy diet

This jumpsuit is a combination of three costumes at once. A helmet from Seva's overalls was perfectly adjusted under a leather jacket, and a light armor with Kevlar inserts, has an external insulating coating, which provides good protection against all types of abnormal influences. Due to the lack of any protection against physical influences, the costume provides very low protection against bullets or fragments. It has built -in mounts for additional modules. \ n \ n %C [0.170,170,170] Characteristics: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] LEAR ARMONIZHIT, and built -in helmet with a closed respiratory system \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n \ n

Fresh bread, baked by the wife of a nimble who lives outside the alienation zone. This was the first matter of a nimble before his business expanded. Currently, he supplies the bartender with this bread, and does not sell it himself, as it was before. \ n \ n %C [0.140,140,140] Descriptions: \ n %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0.140.140.140] POOD \ N %C [0.153,255,255] • %C [0,140,140IALANAGEAL]
